### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.2 fails to filter Slack thread context by sender allowlist, allowing non-allowlisted messages to enter agent context. Attackers can inject unauthorized thread messages through allowlisted user replies to bypass sender access controls and manipulate model context.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7hrg-5w46-5r2x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T16:51:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hrg-5w46-5r2x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7hrg-5w46-5r2x"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T22:16:43Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T00:31:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-qm77-8qjp-4vcm", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41358", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/ac5bc4fb37becc64a2ec314864cca1565e921f2d", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-sender-allowlist-bypass-via-slack-thread-context", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hrg-5w46-5r2x"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Slack thread context could include messages from non-allowlisted senders", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T16:51:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hrg-5w46-5r2x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T16:51:47Z"}
